stemHtml:
Berlin ATC (119.000 MHz) has been informed by intelligence about a suspected unlawful interference on board an aircraft with callsign G-GGDG. The aircraft itself is unaware about the situation. A military aircraft has taken off to intercept. What is the most appropriate course of action by Berlin ATC?

A. Inform G-GGDG of potential interference, so they can divert and land 
B. Do not tell G-GGDG in case it aggarvates the situation 
C. Berlin ATC attempts to contact G-GGDG via 119.000 or 121.500 and inform them of the situation 
D. Berlin ATC calls for total silence on frequency 121.500 until the matter has been resolved 
E. Berlin ATC should get in contact with the intercept control unit in order to provide information about the aircraft to be intercepted
